attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who attacks from within established breaks to fragment groups before key climbs. Uses tactical deception (feigned cramping) and bridging moves from chase groups to position for GC gains.
team_tactics: Operates with high autonomy in breakaways rather than relying on team tempo. Shows veteran craft in positioning through non-climbing stages to defend GC when holding jerseys.
terrain_preference: Undulating finales and medium-mountain stages where breakaways stay clear. Struggles catastrophically on high-altitude summit finishes where pure climbing power decides.
vulnerability: High-altitude finishes expose him severely (4-minute losses documented). Crash-prone in Grand Tours. Chase group dynamics where non-cooperation prevents him from bridging gaps for podiums.
key_patterns: Bridges from chase to front breakaway then attacks to fragment group (2 instances)
Uses tactical deception including feigned cramping to discourage pursuit before attacks (2 instances)
Gains GC positions opportunistically through breakaways when favorites rest (3 instances)
Shows resilience after being dropped on undulating terrain, recovers position (2 instances)
Catastrophic altitude weakness: loses 4+ minutes on high mountain finishes (2 instances)
Sitting on in chase groups demoralizes cooperation but costs podium chances (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2019 Vuelta abandonment after crash while 5th overall represents career setback. 2021 Giro shows continued breakaway capability but age/injuries limiting GC consistency.
